## SECTION 2 — Technology, Science & Space
The massive, highly lucrative world of global e-commerce officially absorbed the absolute, terrifying reality of the dot-com crash. With venture capital aggressively and permanently frozen, massive internet incubators and B2B platforms began heavy, massive waves of catastrophic layoffs. Tech startups with zero profitability, suddenly unable to secure further rounds of incredibly cheap capital, abruptly and aggressively filed for bankruptcy.
